task_completion.description: Verify that a new Opportunity was created with the correct renewal name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Opportunity (Deal) in the CRM named exactly 'Renewal: Premium SLA - Global Logistics'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Opportunity is linked to the correct Organization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Opportunity details, the Organization Name or Related To field should be set to 'Global Logistics Inc'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Opportunity has the correct amount and sales stage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Opportunity details, the Amount field should be '25000' (or 25,000) and the Sales Stage should be 'Needs Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Opportunity has the correct expected close date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Opportunity details, the Expected Close Date should be set to a date that is exactly 6 days from the current system date.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct comment was added to the original Service Contract.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Premium SLA - Global Logistics' Service Contract record. In the comments or updates section, there should be a comment reading exactly 'Renewal opportunity created'.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the web browser to navigate the CRM.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the CRM interface in a web browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the Opportunity was actually saved in the CRM.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the saved Opportunity detail view or the Opportunity listed in the module's list view, not just an unsaved form.

integrity.description: Ensure the comment was actually posted to the contract.
integrity.visual_evidence: The comment 'Renewal opportunity created' should appear as a submitted, timestamped entry in the contract's comment history, not just typed into a text box without being saved.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Service Contract: 'Premium SLA - Global Logistics'. Target Organization: 'Global Logistics Inc'. Expected Opportunity Name: 'Renewal: Premium SLA - Global Logistics'. Expected Amount: 25000. Expected Sales Stage: 'Needs Analysis'. Expected Close Date: Exactly 6 days from the current system date (14 days prior to the contract's expiration in 20 days). Expected Comment on Contract: 'Renewal opportunity created'.
